---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? Describe the *why*,
not only the solution.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it could work.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or related issues.

> Note: TreeMonk is **local-first and private** — features must keep data on the
> user's machine (no cloud, no accounts, no telemetry).
